features: First Steps Fish Design Baby Thermometer
Helps make Sure Bath Water is at a Perfect Temperature to Prevent Burning
description: Product Description First Steps floating baby bath thermometer is a must for your getting ready for baby checklist. Prevent scalds and make sure your precious little one loves bath time. The fish shaped thermometer allows you to check the temperature of the water in your bath, ensuring that your child is not burnt or scalded. The fish shaped thermometer is a great way to have extra safety for your child in the bathroom. Available in pink colour. Safety Warning sytay away from eye contact
